_meta.note: Coverage of ontology entities/actions by implemented code. First domain modelling (Frente I Permutas, Fatia 1) — ALL artifacts are 'planned' (ontology-only proposal; no src/ implementation in this feature). Coverage percentages are 0 by design until TaskScoper/AutoLoopRunner implement. v0.2.1: Yuri answered P0 gaps — P0-1/P0-3/P0-5/P0-6/P0-7/P0-8/P1-2 RESOLVED, both stubs promoted to draft; P0-4 alone stays OPEN (Conexos wire-field probe). Updated by the OntologyCurator after each accepted feature.
